name: @kanonak-protocol/codec
description: The generic Kanonak codec runtime: builds the canonical input model from typed nodes + an embedded schema, content-addresses it via @kanonak-protocol/canonical, and serializes/deserializes the normalized-JSON wire form. Referenced by generated typed SDKs; its only dependency is the lightweight canonical-form library.
author: Kanonak Maintainers (https://github.com/kanonak-protocol/runtime)
